scripts.audit: pnpm run audit:ts && pnpm run audit:shell
scripts.audit:ts: biome check src/ web/src/ && tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p web/tsconfig.json && knip --include files,dependencies,unlisted --exclude binaries --no-config-hints && knip --directory web --include files,dependencies,unlisted --exclude binaries --no-config-hints
scripts.audit:ts:fix: biome check --fix src/ web/src/ && pnpm run audit:ts
scripts.audit:shell: find installer -type f \( -name '*.sh' -o -path 'installer/bin/flitterbot-up' -o -path 'installer/bin/flitterbot-wa' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 bash -n && node --check installer/install.mjs && node --check installer/uninstall.mjs
